faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HubStream.

whatIs.question: What is HubStream?
whatIs.answer: HubStream is a lightweight webinar management tool that connects Google Meet and HubSpot. Create events, embed signup forms on your website, and have registrations automatically sync to your CRM with meeting links generated for you.

googleMeet.question: How does the Google Meet integration work?
googleMeet.answer: When you publish a webinar, HubStream automatically creates a Google Meet link and attaches it to the event. Attendees receive the link in their confirmation email. You need a Google account connected during setup.

hubspotSync.question: How does HubSpot sync work?
hubspotSync.answer: When someone registers, HubStream creates or updates their contact in HubSpot and logs a meeting engagement. You can map custom fields and choose which HubSpot properties to sync.

embed.question: Can I embed the form on any website?
embed.answer: Yes. HubStream provides a one-line iframe embed code that works on any website, blog, or landing page. Paste it where you want the form to appear.

freeLimits.question: What happens when I hit the free plan limits?
freeLimits.answer: You'll need to upgrade to Pro to publish more webinars, add more team members, or remove HubStream branding from embeds. Your existing data stays intact.

upgrade.question: How do I upgrade to Pro?
upgrade.answer: From your dashboard settings, click Upgrade to Pro. You'll go through Stripe checkout. Your Pro features activate immediately.

freeTrial.question: Is there a free trial?
freeTrial.answer: The Free plan is free forever. When you upgrade to Pro, you can cancel anytime. We don't require a credit card to get started.

customDomain.question: Do you support custom domains?
customDomain.answer: Yes, on the Pro plan. You can use your own domain for event pages (e.g. events.yourcompany.com) instead of the default HubStream URL.

finalCta.title: Ready to streamline your webinars?
finalCta.subtitle: Free plan available. No credit card required.
